explanation: Guitar, Piano, Drums, and Violin are all instruments designed to produce musical sounds. A Conductor's Baton is used to direct an orchestra or choir but does not produce sound itself.

category: Original Seven Wonders of the Ancient World
explanation: All tokens except 'Great Wall of China' are part of the original list of the Seven Wonders of the Ancient World. The Great Wall, while an impressive ancient structure, was not on that specific list.

category: Objects typically referred to in the plural form
explanation: Scissors, Trousers, Glasses, and Pliers are all objects whose names are typically plural, even when referring to a single item. 'Chair' is always referred to in its singular form.
